description: Shared Qlik Enterprise Manager REST API connection (base URL + auth). Supports session-based (username/password) auth for dev and API-token auth for production. Pairs with qlik_replicate_task_trigger_job (control), qlik_replicate_task_status_sensor (event-drive), and qlik_replicate_task_metrics_ingestion (observability).

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Resource registration key. Other components reference it via this name.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with the Enterprise Manager base URL (e.g. https://qlikem.acme.com). No trailing slash, no API path — the resource appends /attunityenterprisemanager/api/v1.

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var with Enterprise Manager username (session-based auth). Required unless api_token_env_var is set.

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var with Enterprise Manager password (session-based auth). Required unless api_token_env_var is set.

api_token_env_var.label: API Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with an Enterprise Manager API token. Preferred for production/CI. When set, basic auth fields are ignored.

verify_ssl.label: Verify SSL
verify_ssl.description: Enable TLS verification. Set false only for self-signed dev servers.
